_README: EDITABLE TEXT — HOME (LANDING) PAGE. Change only the text INSIDE the quotes on the right of each colon (:). Do NOT change the labels on the left, and keep every quote ("), comma (,) and curly brace ({ }) exactly where it is. Save the file and the website updates automatically. If a page looks broken after an edit, you probably deleted a quote or comma — undo the change.

testimonials.title: Real Results, Real Families
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from parents and students who have experienced the Success at School difference.
testimonials.t1Quote: The transformation in our daughter's confidence has been remarkable. She went from dreading Mathematics to actually looking forward to her tutoring sessions. The personalised approach made all the difference.
testimonials.t2Quote: Both our children attend for different programs and the progress tracking portal keeps us informed every step of the way. The tutors are genuinely invested in each child's success.
testimonials.t2Outcome: Both children improved by 2+ grade levels
testimonials.t3Quote: Selective preparation felt overwhelming until we found Success at School. Their structured approach and mock test strategy gave our son the edge he needed. Couldn't be happier with the outcome.
testimonials.t3Outcome: Offered placement at Sydney Boys High
testimonials.t4Quote: Starting school can be daunting but the Kindergarten program made it a joy. Our son's reading improved dramatically and he loves going to his sessions. The foundation built here is invaluable.
testimonials.t4Outcome: Reading at Year 1 level by term 3

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about our programs.
faq.q1Question: What are your fees and how do payment plans work?
faq.q1Answer: Fees vary by program, year level, and session format (group or individual). We offer flexible fortnightly and monthly payment plans to make quality tutoring accessible. Contact us for a personalised fee schedule tailored to your child's needs.
faq.q2Question: Do you offer small group or one-on-one tutoring?
faq.q2Answer: Both. We provide small group sessions for collaborative learning, as well as dedicated one-on-one tutoring for students who need individual attention. Many families choose a mix of both formats across different subjects.
faq.q3Question: Can we try a lesson before committing?
faq.q3Answer: Absolutely. We offer a no-obligation trial lesson so you and your child can experience our teaching approach firsthand. There's no commitment — just a chance to meet the tutor and see if it's the right fit.
faq.q4Question: What year levels and subjects do you cover?
faq.q4Answer: We tutor Kindergarten through Year 12 across all core subjects including English, Mathematics, Science, and Humanities. We also offer specialised programs for OC, NAPLAN, and Selective School exam preparation.
faq.q5Question: What happens if my child misses a lesson?
faq.q5Answer: We understand life gets busy. You can reschedule with at least 24 hours' notice at no extra cost. For unforeseen circumstances, we work with families to find a suitable make-up time or provide session materials to keep progress on track.
